title: Add Token Regeneration Link for Expired Tableau Tokens
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see a link to the Tableau Pulse Settings page when my Tableau token is expired or invalid, so that I can quickly regenerate a valid token without hunting for the settings page.
description:
When a Tableau token expires and the user clicks refresh, if the token is invalid the app shows an error screen. The error page needs a helpful link guiding the user to regenerate their token.

### Change
Add a message to the expired token error screen: "Please re-generate and add a valid token: [Tableau Pulse Settings](/user/tableau-server-setting)"
acceptance_criteria: Expired/invalid Tableau token error screen displays a link to Tableau Pulse Settings
Message reads: 'Please re-generate and add a valid token: Tableau Pulse Settings'
ux_changes: Added a link to Tableau Pulse Settings page on the expired token error screen, guiding users to regenerate their token.
implementation_notes: Simple UX improvement on the token error page. Deployed to development for review.
comment_summary: Waqar requested a Tableau token for testing and implemented the change on development.
